title: conyza neriifolia
intro: Conyza neriifolia, also known as the blue false buttonweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant's leaves and flowers have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. Conyza neriifolia is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and acting as an antioxidant, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. The plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
